title: Draconic Shenanigans
description: addon mod to draconic that adds misc draconic items
body:
# Draconic Shenanigans
Draconic Shenanigans is a interesting take on a Draconic Evolution addon mod, just a mod that allows me to add things I think are missing to Draconic.

## Content
At the current release, this mod only has 2 "armor" sets:
- Wyvern Armor Set
- Draconic Armor Set

The armor sets consist of helmet, leggings, and boots, the chestplate being the chestpiece from the Draconic Evolution mod.

### Credits
Credit to Draconic Additions

### Extra Notes
I will be working on this more when I get motivation, for now, enjoy some armor!
